form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 34-day let-up. At the latest run 4th of 12 at this track on March 11 over 1200m, 0.9 len behind Regina Tiara carrying 54kg at $1.70. Before that tracked the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 14 at this track on February 17 over 1200m, 0.5 len behind Bleue Libellule carrying 54kg at $1.30. Has the inside gate and is expected to go well.

Will need to improve many lengths to feature.
